title: M80 Radio
summary: M80 Radio is a radio station in Portugal (and formerly also Spain) playing music from the 1970s, 1980s, 1990s and 2000s.
text:
M80 Radio is a radio station in Portugal (and formerly also Spain) playing music from the 1970s, 1980s, 1990s and 2000s.

History
In Spain, the station began broadcasting on January 18, 1993 as Radio 80 Serie Oro. In 1994, the name was changed to M80. On November 21, 2018 at 6:40 CEST, M80 Radio stopped broadcasting in the country, and was replaced by Los 40 Classic.
In Portugal, it started broadcasting in 2007, in a project made from scratch, adapted to the Portuguese market. The station is owned by Bauer Media Group since 2022. Nuno Castilho de Matos was appointed as its director in January 2024.
